work_unit: local_simulator/post_close_pipeline.py ensure_service resource-leak fix (M-002 from audit-2026-07-06-025)
situation: audit-2026-07-06-025 M-002 finding: PostClosePipeline.ensure_service spawns subprocess.Popen with stdout/stderr file handles passed inline via .open() (no variable holds reference) → fd leak on any exception path. Additionally, when the health-check loop times out, the child process is never terminate'd/kill'd → zombie accumulation if service fails to start. Derived fix dispatched per audit-cycle-state protocol.
action: Refactored ensure_service to: (1) bind stdout_fh/stderr_fh to explicit variables before Popen so they can be closed in finally; (2) wrap Popen + poll loop in try/finally that always closes both handles; (3) on timeout, call process.terminate(), wait(3), then kill()+wait(1) as fallback before raising RuntimeError. Single-file route-fix; no public-interface touch → opt-worktree.sh reused existing local_simulator area worktree.
outcome_evidence: Commit landed on auto/opt-local_simulator-1783352870 (new branch pushed to origin). opt-worktree.sh reported '✓ 提交到 opt-local_simulator-1783352870' and '✓ 已 push auto/opt-local_simulator-1783352870 → origin/auto/opt-local_simulator-1783352870'. Code review link: https://code.alibaba-inc.com/xtool/moni/codereview/new?from=master&to=auto/opt-local_simulator-1783352870
next_suggestion: Mark audit-cycle-state.derived_fixes[M-002] status=merged next round after human CR merge confirmation
Next round also mark L-001 superseded/rejected (substantively addressed by H-001 validate_strategy_source rewrite per audit note)
Once M-002 merged + L-001 rejected → audit-cycle-state.status=cycle-complete → triggers new full audit next cycle

audit_findings.finding: stdout_path.open('a', encoding='utf-8') passed inline to Popen without binding to variable — file handle unreachable on exception/timeout paths → fd leak
audit_findings.remediation: Bind to stdout_fh/stderr_fh variables before Popen; close in try/finally

audit_findings.finding: Timeout path raises RuntimeError without terminate/kill on child Popen → zombie process accumulates across repeated pipeline failures
audit_findings.remediation: On timeout: process.terminate(); wait(timeout=3); on TimeoutExpired: process.kill(); wait(timeout=1)
